metadata.description: Navigate to Ticketmaster, search for NBA basketball games in a major US city, open an event page, select 2 tickets, and view pricing.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account

instruction: Search for upcoming NBA basketball games on Ticketmaster in a major US city and view available ticket pricing for 2 tickets
